task_description: The CMS taxonomy requires an overhaul to clear out outdated promotional data. The context named 'Temporary_Promotions' contains numerous obsolete tags that have been applied to various content items over multiple campaigns. Your objective is to standardize this by assigning the 'Archive_Promo' tag (which can be found in the 'Archives' context) to every single content item currently tagged under any tag within the 'Temporary_Promotions' context. Once all relevant content items have been successfully updated with the new 'Archive_Promo' tag, you must ensure that all old promotional tags are completely detached from the content, and the 'Temporary_Promotions' context is entirely removed from the system.

c5.title: End of Year Promo
c5.body: Last chance for fall promo items.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Demonstrates the initial step in a patient, step-by-step manual migration process.
expected_actions: Retrieve the context IDs for 'Archives' and 'Temporary_Promotions', then list their respective tags to find the necessary tag IDs.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Sequential calls to get_context_by_name followed by list_tags_by_context_id for both contexts.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Perfectly aligns with being patient and unrelenting in work habits, willing to perform tedious, long-hour manual tasks to ensure completion.
expected_actions: For each old tag, list its content, add the 'Archive_Promo' tag, and explicitly call remove_tag_from_content for the old tag.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A prolonged, repetitive execution trace where add_tag_to_content is immediately followed by remove_tag_from_content for individual content items.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Completes the exhaustive manual process by finally removing the empty context, showing perseverance.
expected_actions: Call delete_context on 'Temporary_Promotions' only after all tags have been manually detached from all content.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The delete_context tool is invoked at the very end of the action trajectory, after the manual detachment loop.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Reflects 'thinks before acting' and 'organized' traits by mapping out all necessary data before initiating any state changes.
expected_actions: Retrieve contexts and tags, then systematically list content for all 'Temporary_Promotions' tags to build a complete, deduplicated list of target content IDs.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: All read-only data gathering tools (list_content_by_tag_id) are executed upfront before any mutation tools are called.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Demonstrates a neat, organized approach to state mutation, avoiding the ambiguity of interleaved adding and removing.
expected_actions: Iterate through the deduplicated list of content IDs and apply the 'Archive_Promo' tag.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A clean, uninterrupted sequence of add_tag_to_content calls without any interleaving remove_tag_from_content calls.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Leverages system capabilities for a neat, unambiguous cleanup, avoiding messy manual removals that could leave orphaned data.
expected_actions: Call delete_context on 'Temporary_Promotions' to automatically and flawlessly sever all old tag associations and delete the tags.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Uses delete_context to handle the association cleanup, completely bypassing the remove_tag_from_content tool.
